artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery found Qatar University's central policy portal, the approved English translation of its generative AI instructions, the official Arabic PDF, and the AI Research and Innovation Hub terms page. Approved claims use only directly fetched official text. The Arabic PDF, research repository items, an event page, and research showcase pages were not used as evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: AI Research and Innovation Hub Terms & Conditions
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: The requested resources will be used solely for the research project(s) specified in this request. All required approvals, including IRB or other applicable ethics approvals, have been obtained prior to using these resources. All data stored, processed, or analyzed using these resources has been lawfully obtained and will be handled in accordance with Qatar University's data protection, privacy, and research governance policies. All project members will comply with Qatar University's IT security, acceptable use, and data-handling policies.

artifacts.title: Qatar University Generative AI Policy Evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence from Qatar University's official policy portal, approved English translation of its generative AI instructions, and AI Research and Innovation Hub terms supports agent-reviewed candidate claims on policy scope, disclosure, academic integrity, privacy, output review, accountability, and AI Hub research-resource obligations. The official Arabic PDF was discovered but not used as evidence because machine text extraction returned no usable selectable text.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

The official Arabic PDF was reachable but not machine-readable with the available text extractor, so approved evidence uses the official English translation that states the Arabic version prevails in case of discrepancies.
Research repository records, event pages, and AI project showcases were not treated as policy evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
